name: bespoke-marketplace
description: Bespoke OS — the system that holds your AI output to a higher bar. For anyone tired of slop, hallucinated tone, and influencer false promises. Your soul, guided by Bruce's decade of running it solo. The standard. The cast. The gate.

plugins.name: bespoke-os
plugins.description: Bespoke OS is the operating layer that holds AI work to a real standard. Built for anyone using AI — solo founders, designers, non-creatives, CEOs, small brands, mega brands. A 45+ agent AI cast does the work a team would do, calibrated to founder-grade taste, with a gate that won't let anything ship unless it would actually survive a real founder's review. The user's soul, guided by Bruce's nearly-decade-deep experience. Built to keep users away from AI potholes and influencer false promises.

metadata.tagline: Your soul, guided by Bruce's. The standard. The cast. The gate. Built for anyone tired of AI slop and influencer false promises.

bespoke_for_everyone.note: Real free tier, not a trial. Live here for months if it serves you.

bespoke.price_annual: $150/yr (save $30, 7-day free trial, no refunds on annual prepay)

bespoke_plus_dev.price_annual: +$60/yr ($210 total, annual works out to ~$5/mo extra)

payment_providers.note: AI-friendly providers. Stripe blocks AI-adjacent businesses, so Bespoke uses providers that don't ban us for existing.

metadata.honest_framing: Bespoke isn't the AI. It's the system that holds AI output to a real standard. Your brand, your voice, your taste — channeled through nearly a decade of Bruce running it solo. We don't promise '10x.' We promise real work, the right way, growing with you.
